plan_adherence_notes: The plan is coherent, but execution did not follow it. Relative to `37ef0ae9` (`ff/Tbayes-market-i6y-execute-step-4`), the branch diff contains only `.fleet/tasks/bayes-market-i6y-execute-step-4-execute-step-4/{questions,research,plan}.json`; there are no edits to `backend/server.py` or `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py`. The current `/positions` implementation still serializes the four-field row without `unrealizedPnl`, and none of the planned weighted-average, partial-close, or sign-flip regression tests were added. I ran `pytest tests/test_bayes_market_api.py::BayesMarketExposureProjectionTests -q`, which passed (`14 passed`), but that only confirms the pre-existing projection tests remain green.
reason: Reject. The research and plan line up with the codebase, including the missing `/positions` replay/P&L seam, but this branch never implements the requested representative `unrealizedPnl` regressions or the prerequisite production change needed to support them.
